tools.name: picsart_cinema_studio
tools.description: Opens the Picsart Cinema Studio: build a longer video as a sequence of Shots in a video-player UI. Pick one model per film (Seedance or Kling), generate each Shot (capped at the model max duration), optionally continue a shot from the previous shot's last frame, and save the film into a "Cinema Stud

tools.name: picsart_drive
tools.description:
Single entry point for the authenticated user's Picsart Drive. Pass `action`:
- `list`: browse a folder. `folderUid` omitted = Drive root; set it to descend. Folders are returned first; files are paginated (`page`, `pageSize`<=128, optional `sort`, optional `type` filter). Set `flat: true` to list e

tools.name: picsart_remove_bg
tools.description: Removes the background from an image, returning a transparent cutout of the foreground subject. Auto-picks the newest enabled Picsart remove-bg model unless overridden via the `model` param — no need to call `picsart_list_models` first. Use this when the user asks to "remove the background", "cut ou

tools.name: picsart_change_bg
tools.description: Replaces the background of an image with a new scene described by a prompt, keeping the foreground subject intact. Auto-picks the newest enabled Picsart change-bg model unless overridden via the `model` param — no need to call `picsart_list_models` first. Use this when the user wants to "change the

tools.name: picsart_enhance
tools.description: Upscales and enhances an image — sharpens edges, denoises, and raises resolution by an optional scale factor. Auto-picks the newest enabled Picsart upscale / enhance model unless overridden via the `model` param. Use this when the user asks to "upscale", "enhance", "make it higher resolution", "shar

tools.name: picsart_vectorize
tools.description: Converts a raster image (PNG, JPG) into an SVG vector. Auto-picks the newest enabled Picsart vectorize model unless overridden via the `model` param. Use this when the user asks to "vectorize", "convert to SVG", "make this a vector", or wants a scalable version of a logo or icon. Best results on log

tools.name: picsart_generate
tools.description: Runs any Picsart AI model end-to-end to produce an image, video, audio, or text result. Spends credits. Recommended flow: `picsart_list_models` to pick the model → `picsart_model_params` to learn its inputs → `picsart_preflight` to validate the payload and quote cost → `picsart_generate` to actually

tools.name: picsart_job_status
tools.description: Checks a generation job started by `picsart_generate` with `async: true`. Widget-facing: widgets poll this every few seconds with the returned job handle; assistants normally call `picsart_generate` synchronously and never need this tool. While running it returns `{ status: "ACCEPTED"|"IN_PROGRESS",

tools.name: picsart_list_models
tools.description: Lists Picsart AI models across ALL modes (image / video / audio / text) and renders the Picsart Studio model-picker widget so the USER can browse, compare, and pick a model visually. Each item carries `id`, `name`, `mode`, `inputType` (and `provider`, `badges`, `description` when `verbose` is true).

tools.name: picsart_model_catalog
tools.description: Returns the Picsart AI model catalog as plain data — renders NO widget or UI. Use this when YOU (the assistant) need catalog knowledge for your own reasoning: picking a model before `picsart_generate`, answering "which models support X", or comparing options — without pushing a model-picker widget i

tools.name: picsart_model_params
tools.description: Returns the parameter schema for a specific Picsart model — a map of param name to descriptor ({ type, required, default, enum, min, max, step, label, accept }). Use this once you have a model id and need to construct the params payload for `picsart_generate` or feed `picsart_preflight` with a candi

tools.name: picsart_preflight
tools.description: Free pre-flight check before `picsart_generate`: in ONE call it (1) validates a candidate params object against the model's parameter schema + inter-parameter constraints, and (2) quotes the credit cost — without running the model or charging the user. Use this after assembling params (user input, d

tools.name: picsart_credits
tools.description: Returns the current Picsart credit balance for the authenticated user — `balance` (active credits available now) plus the breakdown into `resettable` (recurring monthly/period quota) and `accumulative` (top-ups and add-ons), `total` (active credits across both pools), and `overdraftUsage` (credits s

tools.name: picsart_music_studio
tools.description: Opens the Picsart Music Studio: browse music/audio models, compose with a guided prompt builder, generate and play tracks, create AI album-cover art, revisit previously generated tracks, and save everything into a "Music Studio" folder in the user's Picsart Drive. Use when the user wants to MAKE mus

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "picsart_drive" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: picsart_drive, picsart_vectorize, picsart_generate, picsart_model_params · Private data: picsart_drive, picsart_remove_bg, picsart_change_bg, picsart_enhance, picsart_vectorize, picsart_generate, picsart_model_catalog, picsart_model_params · Public sink: picsart_drive · Destructive: picsart_drive, picsart_remove_bg, picsart_enhance, picsart_vectorize, picsart_generate, picsart_preflight, picsart_credits.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: picsart_drive, picsart_vectorize, picsart_generate, picsart_model_params · Private data: picsart_drive, picsart_remove_bg, picsart_change_bg, picsart_enhance, picsart_vectorize, picsart_generate, picsart_model_catalog, picsart_model_params · Public sink: picsart_drive · Destructive: picsart_drive, picsart_remove_bg, picsart_enhance, picsart_vectorize, picsart_generate, picsart_preflight, picsart_credits

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "picsart_generate" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "(hash d0456533)" → after: "Runs any Picsart AI model end-to-end to produce an image, video, audio, or text result. Spends credits. Recommended flow: `picsart_list_models` to pick the model → `picsart_model_params` to learn its inputs → `picsart_preflight` to validate the payload and quote cost → `picsart_generate` to actually"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
